scope.family: Goal 16 graph-CZ encoded bridge dynamics plus a star-local screen tensor network whose channels are derived by partial trace
scope.local_screen_pattern: coin source plus independent north/south local transfer tensors; no direct north/south tensor and no declared screen router
scope.atlas_bound: all simple graphs, all mouth permutations, and screen probabilities {0,0.5,1} for m<=3

core_claim: A single finite local interaction pattern derives the mouth map, right-mouth graph-CZ interaction, dressed observer algebra, exact bridge transfer, exact north/south screen erasure channels, and the recovery/area-analogue transition.

exact_theorem_style_claims.claim: The screen dynamics is built from a coin source and local north/south transfer tensors, with no direct north/south tensor and no separately declared router.
Tracing either screen from the local tensor network gives an exact qutrit erasure channel whose keep probability equals the local branch weight.
Full-block MI recovers pi, Pauli-correlation tomography recovers G, and CZ_G conjugation reconstructs the dressed observer algebra.
Inverse CZ_G plus recovered pi restores exact bridge transfer; wrong-mouth and mouth-blind controls fail on the representative witness.
Recovery fidelity and the finite quantum-area analogue are computed from the same local screen channels and transition together at p=1/2.
Entropy-only, static-state-only, and external-area-bias controls identify which weaker diagnostics do not determine the oriented screen transition.

bounded_exhaustive_evidence.scope: m=3 path graph, twisted pairing, local north branch probability 0.75
all simple graphs, all mouth permutations, and screen probabilities 0,0.5,1 for m<=3

controls.claim: At p=0.75, screen entropies tie while channel recovery favors north.
Identity activation on the twisted representative has capacity 1<3 after interaction removal.
The mouth-blind scrambling control has zero structured named-mouth capacity.
Static bridge-state diagnostics alone remain compatible with opposite north/south recovery winners.
A bare area bias shifts the area crossing to 0.375 while recovery remains at 0.5.

proof_obligations.claim: Emit the Goal 18 intrinsic local bridge-screen dynamics certificate.
Regression check for the Goal 18 certificate.
Validate the machine-readable Goal 18 certificate index.

known_vs_new.known_derived: Stabilizer graph-CZ bridge codes, Pauli-correlation stabilizer recovery, Bell transfer checks, erasure-channel Stinespring dilations, and Choi/Kraus diagnostics.
known_vs_new.new_programmatic_contribution: Replaces Goal 17's declared screen router with a local tensor-network screen dynamics whose reduced channels, recovery transition, and area analogue are derived diagnostics of the same finite local interaction pattern.

limitations: Finite stabilizer/QEC and dense-channel benchmark only. The local screen tensor network is not continuum geometry, de Sitter, dS/CFT, or a chaotic many-body wormhole.
